title: Firefox keeps crashing, gives my a blue screen and computer keeps restarting
content:
Hello,

Firefox keeps having problems. Several bugs are still not solved. Updating does nothing! Everyone or so what makes it more worse. Firefox keeps crashing at random. Become slow, not responding, delays or lag.

Currently, Firefox keeps crashing, then gives my a blue screen and computer restarts. My computer keeps shutting down, when I'm logged in, see my desktop again, with 10 seconds and just do nothing.

1 Keep Firefox open for hours and the Firefox stops responding, the window gets white, gray or dark. 2 Clicking on something and nothing will happen. In other cases, this is slow. This might let close Firefox too. 3 Right menu doesn't open or this takes more time then before. 4 Icons from extensions don't appear anymore in right side from top, next to the address bar. 5 When open a site in a new tab, this tab is still empty. In other cases, content in strange, incomplete. Also I can see just 1 or more dots jumping from left to right on the top from this tab. 6 Some sites seems to not work with Firefox, there is an error message, a strange message or empty window. Others keep giving floating messages or popup windows. 7 Sites opened in new tab don't load. When I copy the URL and open a new tab by my itself, this can work. Same when do this with new window or private mode for last attempt. 8 Pressing the C key seems not longer always working in Firefox and Thunderbird. Letters, search, text with the C become difficult, as the CTRL+C action. 9 When keeping Firefox and Thunderbird open together for longer time, one seems to like crash, just itself or both. 10 Bugs in playing YouTube videos: -They don't play at all or wrong video is played. -Selected video stops playing somewhere between 10 an 59 seconds. -Subtitles are not remembered. Settings, which language, when subtitles should be showed. -There is some delays or lag while playing some videos. Some videos stop for a second or few seconds, before continue playing. Other videos can do some jump or have some flickering, before continue playing. -Some videos don't play in current or new opened tab, until I copy their URLs and open an new tab or window by myself to paste their URLs in it. -Switching to full screen should be fast, direct. I see for maybe a full minute a black screen. This video is still play and I can hear the audio from it. Switching back is done fast. -There is no or damaged content on the video page. Just a black box with nothing else. Gray shapes where video, title, and description should be. Right side with recommendations is white or gone. -Video quality is not set to highest, must do this by my self. 11 In some case Windows shows messages about: -Firefox does harm to my computer / Windows, must be closed to prevent further problems. -Firefox takes to much memory. -Firefox doesn't respond anymore. With the wait or close options. 12 How to disable that when site shows your language, without asking, but you don't like this and want to see these sites in English / their default language?

Updating Firefox as Thunderbird is not a solution, these bugs are still there. On my other computer the closing random, not responding, become slow, problems playing YouTube videos are there too.

Both have Windows 10 and a cable internet connection.

Who can help me? Is there a good and long time solution?

Regards.
creator: Rapha-L_Pherdiux
